LanguageData.CAO.BeginSampling.Desc: Snapshot current stored resources. Net stockpile change from now until archival sets the outpost's per-resource rate (surplus shipped home, deficit drawn from carried reserves).
LanguageData.CAO.Archive.Desc: Destroy this colony's map. All colony pawns (colonists, animals, prisoners) and stored goods move into an abstract outpost that keeps producing the sampled surplus and ships it home.
LanguageData.CAO.LastBase: Cannot archive your last home base — there would be nowhere to deliver resources.
LanguageData.CAO.ShortSampleWarning: Sampling time under one day — rate has been floored to one day.
LanguageData.CAO.ArchivalConfirm.Title: Confirm Archival
LanguageData.CAO.SamplingStatus.Title: Sampling Status
LanguageData.CAO.ViewSampling.Desc: Preview the current resource flow rates based on sampling so far.
LanguageData.CAO.StopSampling.Desc: End the sampling period without archiving. All sampled data will be discarded.
LanguageData.CAO.StopSampling.Confirm: Stop sampling and discard all sampled data?
LanguageData.CAO.ArchivalConfirm.ScalePawn: Scale rates by colonist count (sampling time: {0})
